about.label: About Us
about.title: Quality Foundation – Creating Sustainable Value
about.description:
We are a factory specializing in the production of wood, plastic, and industrial material products, serving both domestic and export markets. With modern machinery, closed production processes, and an experienced technical team, we are committed to delivering products that meet high standards of durability, precision, and finish quality.
Continuously improving technology and optimizing processes, we aim to provide efficient, stable, and long-term manufacturing solutions for our partners, from standard products to custom manufacturing (OEM / ODM).

about.whoWeAreDescription:
DUYANG VIETNAM is a factory specializing in the production and processing of products made from wood, metal, and plastic, serving both domestic and export markets. With a modern production system, closed-loop processes, and an experienced technical team, we provide stable, precise, and scalable manufacturing solutions for large-scale production as well as custom processing (OEM / ODM).
We are committed to delivering products that meet quality standards, with high durability and consistency in every order.
